prompt: Break inline requirements into tickets in FRONTEND with correct issue types.
assertions: Handles inline spec without needing Confluence fetch
Uses jira.mjs issue-types FRONTEND to check available types
Maps requirement #3 (mobile Safari bug) to Bug type
Maps requirement #6 (API docs) to Task type
Maps feature requirements (#1,2,4,5) to Story type
Creates Epic first, then child tickets with --parent
Presents plan with labeled issue types before creating
